scripts.dev:turbo: npm run strip-pwa-dev && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev -H 0.0.0.0 --turbo
scripts.dev:clean: npm run strip-pwa-dev && rm -rf .next && sh -c 'for pid in $(lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $pid 2>/dev/null || true; done' && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev -H 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:reset: npm run strip-pwa-dev && rm -rf .next && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev -H 0.0.0.0
